warnings: Ch9 line 77: gray-flour bay closed door is the only on-page reference to the nano programmer (CH7-MED-01 unnamed-tracking remains valid; entity not on-page)

hook.content: Peter, on a habit of attention he could not have explained at the time, asks the integrator a different question — and finds the reference epochs are not distributed across the cover-storys million-year envelope but clustered tightly around a single point in deep time. A line, not a smear. He pulls down the stellar-cartography comparison tool he has not run since Helix and queries the historical epoch catalogues on his eight-year-old datapad. A small progress bar opens, quietly, where the warning flag used to live, and begins to load.

pattern.opening_note: multi-day belonging compression Sol 51-57 + Sol 58 1830 corridor catch

ending.location: Nav Lab, Kuiper Belt Asteroid Base
